query:
SELECT 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM plans) as plans_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM nas) as nas_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM radius_cards) as cards_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM subscribers) as subscribers_count,
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM reseller_profiles) as reseller_profiles_count;
